rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a plan file can't be written to disk (permission prompts), submit the plan as text instead — it still executes normally.","scope":"pipeline/plan.md"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Unused variables (e.g., `issueUrlPattern`, `issueNumbers`) declared but not read will cause ESLint failures in verify scripts — prefix with `_` to suppress.","scope":"verify-taskify.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Use Kahn's algorithm for topological ordering verification — clean, O(V+E), and unambiguous compared to manual comparisons.","scope":"topo order verification"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Run `kody taskify` in local mode (no MCP/GH credentials required) and read from `taskify-result.json` for deterministic scripted verification.","scope":"kody taskify verification"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Verify script failures in `verify.md` can be driven by pre-existing errors in unrelated files — isolate verification to only the target output.","scope":"
